scripts.mobile:test:usecase: cd frontend/mobile && fvm flutter test test/usecase
scripts.mobile:test:function: cd frontend/mobile && fvm flutter test test/function
scripts.mobile:test:widget: cd frontend/mobile && fvm flutter test test/widget_test.dart
scripts.sb:types:gen: cd backend && supabase gen types typescript --local > ../frontend/web/src/types/database.types.ts
scripts.check:deno:functions: cd backend/supabase/functions && deno task lint && deno task check
scripts.check:deno:test: cd backend/supabase/test && deno task lint && deno task fmt && deno task check
scripts.check:rules: npm run check:rules:sql && npm run check:rules:code && npm run check:rules:zod
scripts.check:all: npm run check:biome:ci && npm run check:web:types && npm run check:deno:functions && npm run check:deno:test && npm run check:mobile && npm run check:rules
scripts.security:deps: npm run security:deps:web && npm run security:deps:mobile && npm run security:deps:fastapi && npm run security:deps:supabase
scripts.security:sast: semgrep scan --config p/ci --config p/typescript --config p/react --config p/nextjs --config p/python --config p/secrets --severity ERROR --severity WARNING --exclude node_modules --exclude .next --exclude .venv --exclude build --exclude playwright-report --exclude test-results --exclude .test-results --exclude '*.g.dart' --exclude '*.freezed.dart'
scripts.security:all: npm run security:secrets && npm run security:deps && npm run security:sast
scripts.test:report: node -e "const p=require('node:path');const fs=require('node:fs');const f=p.join('.test-results','summary.md');if(!fs.existsSync(f)){console.error('summary.md がありません。先に npm run test:all を実行してください。');process.exit(1);}process.stdout.write(fs.readFileSync(f,'utf8'));"
